title: stale project facts should be demoted before retrieval injection

prepare_commands:
python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path

path = Path("src/memory/manager.rs")
text = path.read_text()
text = text.replace(
    "let stale = if record_needs_revalidation(record) {\n        \":stale\"\n    } else {\n        \"\"\n    };",
    "let stale = \"\";",
)
text = text.replace(
    "fn record_needs_revalidation(record: &MemoryRecord) -> bool {",
    "fn record_needs_revalidation(_record: &MemoryRecord) -> bool {\n    return false;\n}\n\nfn disabled_record_needs_revalidation(record: &MemoryRecord) -> bool {",
)
path.write_text(text)
PY

prompt:
修复过期 project fact 仍然高置信注入 retrieval context 的问题。

要求：
- typed MemoryRecord 要能根据 last_verified_at/evidence 判断 needs_revalidation。
- stale project/tool facts 的 retrieval score 和 trust 必须降级。
- stale record 的 provenance/reason 要能说明 needs revalidation。
- 新 verified project fact 可以 supersede 旧的未验证 fact，但不能删除审计历史。
expected_behavior: stale project fact 不再作为 High trust memory 注入。
retrieval reason 能暴露 stale/needs revalidation。
verified replacement record 会把旧 record 标成 superseded。

required_commands: python3 -c "p='src/memory/manager.rs'; s=open(p).read(); assert 'record_needs_revalidation' in s and ':stale' in s and 'superseded_by' in s"
python3 -c "p='src/engine/retrieval_context.rs'; s=open(p).read(); assert 'needs revalidation' in s and 'TrustLevel::Low' in s and ':stale:' in s"
human_review: stale 判断是否基于 record metadata，而不是模糊文本？
supersede 是否保留旧 record 的审计历史？
